title: CAMPS - 211info
text: ROGUE CREDIT UNION COMMUNITY COMPLEX CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of youth day camps. Some theme camps include art, dance, sports such as lacrosse and basketball, and outdoor skills. 901 Rossanley Drive Rogue X Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Most activities are for children ages 5-12 Hours: Varies by camp Email (541) 774-2400 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 774-2400 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: Varies by camp DOCUMENTS: Varies by camp LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Medford SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 6am-8:30pm, Friday/Saturday 8am-7pm, Sunday 11am-7pm Services: Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CITY OF MEDFORD PARKS AND RECREATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
